librgetter.config.autoTool: Automatically select a tool to break the lectern efficiently
librgetter.config.checkUpdate: Check for version update and notify about it on a first world join
librgetter.config.fallback: Fallback option to search for unsupported enchantments; not guaranteed to make a match; may cause lag with a large list of enchantments
librgetter.config.lock: Automatically lock the trade once found
librgetter.config.logMode:
Send trade logs:
NONE - don't send
CHAT - to the chat
ACTIONBAR - to the action bar
librgetter.config.manual: Mode for manually breaking and replacing the lecterns
librgetter.config.matchAtLeast: Number of unique trades which must match the goals list to consider the attempt a success
librgetter.config.matchMode:
When to stop cycling:
VANILLA - regular trade matches
PERFECT - all offered trades must match the goals list
ATLEAST - at least N trades must match the goals list
librgetter.config.offhand: Put the lectern in the offhand for efficient placement
librgetter.config.removeGoal: Automatically remove an enchantment from the goals list once found
librgetter.config.rotationMode:
Rotate the head before placing the lectern and talking to the librarian:
NONE - don't rotate
INSTANT - instant head rotation
SMOOTH - more natural head rotation; slows down the process
librgetter.config.safeChecker: Check if the villager can interfere with the placing process
librgetter.config.timeout: Time in seconds to wait for a villager to update its profession before replacing the lectern; set to 0 to disable
librgetter.config.waitLose: Wait for the villager to lose its profession; may slow down the process, but guarantees the profession update during lags
librgetter.config.warning: Send warnings for custom enchantment formats
librgetter.error.argument: This argument type is not supported!
librgetter.error.config.init: Could not create new config, adjustments will not be saved!
librgetter.error.config.nofield: Could not find config declaration '%s', report this to the developer!
librgetter.error.config.read: Could not read existing config, falling back to defaults!
librgetter.error.config.uncategorized: Uncategorized config declaration '%s', report this to the developer!
librgetter.error.find_lectern: Could not find a lectern near you!
librgetter.error.find_librarian: Could not find a librarian near you!
librgetter.error.goals: There are no entries in the goals list!
librgetter.error.internal: Internal Error: %s == null (%s), please report this error so it can be fixed
librgetter.error.lock: Not enough items to lock the trade!
librgetter.error.no_lectern: The lectern has not been set!
librgetter.error.no_librarian: The librarian has not been set!
librgetter.error.not: '%s' is not in the goals list!
librgetter.error.pick: Villager picked another profession during process!
librgetter.error.unknown: Unknown type of data for the plugin '%s'
librgetter.error.unsafe: The villager could interfere with the placing process, please obstruct the lectern
librgetter.error.update: The librarian trades can not be updated!
librgetter.feedback.version:
New version of LibrGetter has been released:
%s
librgetter.keys.select: Select the lectern or the librarian
librgetter.success.add_custom: Added custom enchantment '%s' with max price %s
librgetter.success.found: Successfully found '%s' after %s tries for a price of %s emeralds!
librgetter.warning.level: Level for '%s' over the max. Max level: %s
librgetter.warning.notrade: '%s' can not be traded by librarians
